item.title: From Floppy Swaps to Cross-Platform Power: My Journey to Lazarus FPC 🚀
item.description: Hey everyone! Today, I want to share a bit about my programming journey and introduce you to a fantastic, often overlooked tool that’s been a consistent companion through the years: Lazarus Free Pascal.
